topics.answer: The Enterprise plan supports up to 500 seats. Beyond that, you need a custom contract with the sales team.
Go to Settings > Security, click 'Reset Password', and follow the email link we send you. The link expires in 30 minutes.
Yes. All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256, and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.
Annual subscriptions can be refunded on a pro-rated basis within the first 30 days. After 30 days, no refunds are issued.
We support deployment in US-East, US-West, EU-Frankfurt, and AP-Singapore regions.
Yes. Enterprise accounts receive a 99.9% uptime SLA with service credits applied if we fall below that threshold.
Audit logs are retained for 365 days on the Enterprise plan and 90 days on the Business plan.
Yes. You can export all of your data as JSON or CSV from the Admin console for up to 60 days after cancellation.
